Verified from task.json description ('TWO distinct soft tissue lesions') and verifier.py logic.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses a real multi-frame X-Ray Angiography (XA) sample downloaded from Rubo Medical (dicom_viewer_0002.zip, 0002.DCM), which is placed in the oncology_ct study directory and used as a proxy for a CT scan. The agent acts as a Radiologist applying the RECIST 1.1 measurement standard, requiring at least 2 distinct lesion measurements. The Weasis soft tissue window is explicitly specified as Window Width 400 and Window Level 50.
